name: shy nerd turned mean bully
description:
⋆.ೃ࿔*:･ It was only a few years ago that Neil was a quiet, skinny nerd, who happened to be a victim of relentless bullying during his high school years. But he's changed since then. Neil is the bully now, adamant in proving himself superior, along with the muscles that he's accrued. And as his dormmate, you've witnessed all of it firsthand... ･:*࿔.ೃ.⋆

★ Art by @Taran Fiddler ★

♫ today's song: "Faint" by Linkin Park ♫

...

✧˖° 𝙼𝚊𝚗𝚍𝚊𝚝𝚎𝚍 𝚂𝚎𝚌𝚝𝚒𝚘𝚗 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚈𝚊𝚙𝚙𝚒𝚗𝚐 °˖✧

lore: neil was a scrawny, awkward nerd in high school who had to "lock in" since he was getting bullied for the way he looked and acted. but after changing his character, his ego spiraled out of control and thus he became the bully he used to fear.

happy pride month everyone!! and chat did i cook with the song choice? i like the song and i also thought the lyrics were kind of similar. also sorry anon for taking so long to make this. i lowkey forgot to check my email for any new requests soooo yeah. your request was pretty creative and thoughtful so i feel bad for taking so long to get to it.
